name: Yucatan BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon achiote seed softened in warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the lemons and oranges to get long strips of peel.
2. Squeeze the juice from the peeled fruits.
3. Combine the fruit juice with the peel in a bowl.
4. Add all other ingredients to the bowl and mix well.
5. Working in batches, transfer the mixture to a food processor or blender.
6. Process until the sauce is chopped into a coarse, sticky paste.
7. The sauce freezes well; you may freeze it at this stage.
8. Spread the sauce thickly on chicken or fish.
9. Marinate in the refrigerator for as long as possible, at least overnight.
10. Baste occasionally during cooking.
11. Serves 3-4 chickens.
